release.title: Profile 2.4.0 — Recruiter Visual Evidence Edition
release.baseline: Profile 2.3.1 — Release Integrity & Review-Gated Automation Patch
release.summary: A recruiter-facing visual refresh with current Ivrit Sheli 2.2 desktop, mobile and Hebrew RTL proof, lighter motion assets and synchronized portfolio evidence across Kevin's featured work.
focus: Current live Ivrit Sheli 2.2 desktop, mobile and Hebrew RTL visual evidence
Smaller recruiter-facing animations with static reduced-motion fallbacks
Versioned CV, learning archive and collaboration-case-study presentation
Reproducible social-preview assets ready for explicit GitHub upload
Stable public claims with honest OAuth, privacy and release boundaries
release.public_data_boundary: Only public repository facts, deterministic or synthetic demonstration visuals and reviewed sanitized live captures are included; no private learning history, wellness history, runtime database record, secret, provider credential or personal export is published.

identity.name: Kevin Cusnir
identity.headline: Junior Frontend & Full-Stack Developer · Creative Technologist
identity.positioning: I build React, TypeScript, Python and SQL products with accessible multilingual UX, data honesty and practical automation.
identity.availability: Open to junior frontend, full-stack and creative-technology opportunities

languages.name: Hebrew
languages.product_value: Israeli workplace communication and RTL product testing

projects.name: Nova Music Lab
projects.problem: Listening exports are fragmented, hard to compare and easy to misrepresent.
projects.solution: A local-first music museum that turns exports from five listening ecosystems into source-aware analytics, visual stories and a portable personal archive.
projects.stack: React · TypeScript · Vite · Vitest · Recharts · GitHub Actions
projects.evidence: Five import families, source normalization, deduplication, automated tests, bundle budgets, CI and a live GitHub Pages build
projects.role_signal: Frontend engineering · data visualization · privacy-aware product thinking
highlights: Five import families normalized into one model
Lazy-loaded museum rooms and bundle budgets
Fourteen themes, EN/ES UX, reduced-motion support and Hebrew resource tooling

projects.name: Ivrit Sheli
projects.problem: Hebrew learners need focused practice, progress and multilingual guidance without surrendering private study data or depending on a fragile cloud service.
projects.solution: A private-first trilingual Hebrew-learning product with local SQLite, authenticated PostgreSQL, native RTL, accessible motion and a synthetic read-only public demo.
projects.stack: React 19 · TypeScript · FastAPI · Python · PostgreSQL 17 · SQLite · Alembic · Docker · Railway
projects.evidence: Verified Railway production and PostgreSQL readiness for release baseline c8c928661bdc, with 139 backend + 48 frontend = 187 passing tests; GitHub OAuth consent handoff and cancellation are verified, while final live code exchange, session refresh and logout remain unverified end to end
projects.role_signal: Full-stack architecture · backend security · PostgreSQL ownership · integration testing · multilingual RTL UX
highlights: Private local SQLite and authenticated PostgreSQL modes
Real PostgreSQL migration, persistence, session and cross-user isolation tests
English, Spanish and Hebrew interfaces with native RTL behavior
Live read-only synthetic recruiter demo with paid provider calls disabled by default

media.alt: Current Ivrit Sheli 2.2.0 live product tour showing the responsive Spanish dashboard, compact mobile layout and fully mirrored Hebrew right-to-left interface
media.static_alt: Current Ivrit Sheli 2.2.0 live Spanish dashboard with cloud mode, responsive navigation and default learning recommendations
media.mobile_alt: Current Ivrit Sheli 2.2.0 live compact mobile dashboard at a 390-pixel viewport
media.rtl_alt: Current Ivrit Sheli 2.2.0 live Hebrew right-to-left dashboard with mirrored navigation and layout
media.description: Fresh browser QA of the verified live 2.2.0 deployment documents desktop, 390-pixel mobile and Hebrew RTL behavior. The animation is assembled from those current captures and keeps a static reduced-motion path.
media.caption: Ivrit Sheli 2.2.0 live interface:
media.public_data_boundary: The sanitized live captures use Kevin's isolated account and show his already-public name/avatar plus default recommendations (12 words, one oral practice and 10 minutes); they contain no private study history, credential, token, provider result or production database record.

portfolio_sync.oauth_boundary: Consent handoff and cancellation are verified; the final live authorization-code exchange, authenticated refresh persistence and logout are not verified end to end.

projects.name: NovaFit
projects.problem: Daily wellness data should remain portable, understandable and private.
projects.solution: A local-first Windows wellness intelligence studio with isolated profiles, English, Spanish and Hebrew RTL, efficient motion, explainable analytics, complete verified backups and one-click self-repair.
projects.stack: Python · Tkinter · SQLite · Requests · Faker · Matplotlib
projects.evidence: 124 discovered automated tests, 12 themes, EN/ES/HE RTL UX, verified complete backups, 58 public visual assets, one-click verification and strict release audit
projects.role_signal: Python application architecture · desktop UX · SQLite migrations · i18n/RTL · analytics · release engineering
highlights: Multi-profile SQLite isolation
Hebrew right-to-left interface
Four analytics studios
Purposeful reduced-motion-aware animation
Complete all-profile ZIP backups with SHA-256
JSON, CSV, PNG and offline HTML exports
One-click Windows setup, launch and verification
Installable public Pages showcase with no desktop-data access

media.alt: NovaFit 4.2.0 seeded public demo moving through the Wellness Command Center, Motivation Center, Sport and Data Coach, isolated profiles, English, Spanish and Hebrew, including a Hebrew RTL workspace
media.description: A concise recruiter-facing desktop tour demonstrates navigation, motivation design, explainable coaching, profile isolation and multilingual RTL behavior; the static evidence below documents the analytics and twelve-theme system.
media.caption: NovaFit 4.2.0 in motion:
media.public_data_boundary: The tour and static fallback use clearly labeled seeded demo profiles and deterministic synthetic records; they contain no real wellness history, runtime database, secret or private export.

projects.name: Christopher Rodríguez Portfolio
projects.problem: A real educator needed a maintainable bilingual professional presence.
projects.solution: An accessible React and TypeScript portfolio with structured content, verification states, persistent themes and GitHub Pages delivery.
projects.stack: React · TypeScript · Vite · Tailwind CSS · Framer Motion
projects.evidence: EN/ES content architecture, keyboard UX, reduced motion, SEO and automated deployment
projects.role_signal: Client communication · accessible frontend · maintainable content architecture
highlights: Content separated from presentation
Bilingual EN/ES experience and persistent preferences
Verification states for professional claims

projects.name: Fullstack2026
projects.problem: Course exercises need context, progression and reproducible quality checks.
projects.solution: A structured archive from Python and OOP through JavaScript, DOM, async workflows, TypeScript, Node and databases.
projects.evidence: Six curriculum weeks, 14 discoverable test files, CI, generated audits and transparently documented remaining quality gates
projects.role_signal: Learning progression · problem solving · Git/PR discipline
highlights: Python and OOP foundations
DOM, asynchronous JavaScript, TypeScript, Node and SQL
Repository-wide documentation, audit reports and visible unresolved gates

strengths: Accessible multilingual product design, including RTL behavior
Data transformation, validation and honest handling of uncertainty
Clear technical documentation and visual product storytelling
Local-first privacy decisions and proportional security claims
Responsible early-adopter testing of preview and beta software in non-critical contexts, with reproducible feedback aimed at improving future releases
growth: Production monitoring, service-level objectives and alert design
PostgreSQL backup, restore and migration drills
Authorization, OAuth and browser-level end-to-end testing
Free-tier deployment, capacity and cost operations

education.coverage: Python, OOP, SQL, JavaScript, React, Redux, Node.js, Express, JWT, TypeScript, Git/GitHub and deployment.
education.current: Completing and converting remaining coursework into tested, deployable portfolio evidence.
